title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kyoshiro, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Orochi, Unknown person #4 as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wano Country Flower Capital

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An accident! Emergency!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A forest fire in Kuri!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And we've caught him! Finally!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We caught midnight boy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi, I know you are currently grieving the loss of Komurasaki, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have some- thing about midnight boy that I need to tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: silence! I couldn't care less about some pudding burglar!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, but his identity... it seems he's not all that pudding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You fools could never understand my pain at losing the love of my life!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such a beauty does not exist anywhere else in the world! Bring back Komurasaki!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not presume to doubt your words, but... If you had let someone that so deeply insulted your grace live,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your Grace's honor and dignity would have suffered drastically!

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: Kyoshiro acted well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And thank you so much for coming out of your room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The hero of the pennless, midnight boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have captured him, and he is being held in the prison house in Rasetsu town, but... it seems

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: His real identity is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How is that fool still alive?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By making an example of him, of course!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Broadcast the footage throughout the country using the light-gram!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've already arranged for the light-gram, your grace.

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: NGGHHH! Kyoshiro!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Today is Komurasaki's funeral.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With so many people gathered in one place, we must do our best to prevent panic and chaos. Naturally, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We have already taken precautions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then let us have the midnight boy die alongside Komurasaki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A sacrifice, if you will.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two biggest stars of the capital winking out at the same time. How ironic!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must see this for myself. Prepare my horse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're Kidding!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop, I don't want to hear bad jokes this early in the morning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm serious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAAAG GHHAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Komura- SAKIII II!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HOOK UP YOUR LIGHT-GRAM SNALL AND TAKE A LOOK

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: woro roro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi! Show me the Capital!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Y- Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Light-gram snail

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shit... He's found out that Ko- Murasaki died!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh?! The heck is going on?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi! Balloon!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
